name: generic
description: Portable starter rules for repos without an operator-specific domain profile.

patterns: what should i work on next
rules.failure_signal: Work selection and closeout can drift when repo-local routing is not re-read.
rules.gate: Before choosing or closing work, read repo instructions, local skill inventory, and the backlog/source-of-truth files named by the current checkout.

rules.failure_signal: Completion claims are weak unless validation output is current and quoted.
rules.gate: Before claiming completion, run the discovered validation commands or mark each skipped command as needs_verification with the exact command.

rules.failure_signal: Implementation can expand beyond the requested packet or do-not-build boundary.
rules.gate: Before editing, restate the active scope and do-not-build boundary; move overflow into needs_verification or backlog instead of implementing it.
